content_review.note: CLEANEST CYCLE YET. All 6 social content files passed with zero violations. content_cycle_mar7_autonomy.md (13 pieces) and competitive_intel_posts.md (4 posts + 1 thread) are production-ready. Consequence-first hooks, specific numbers, proper PRINTMAXXER voice throughout. The content generators have clearly improved since cycle 8.

outreach_review.note: batch_20260307.md dental outreach is EXCELLENT. All 10 emails are personalized with specific site issues, under 100 words, consequence-first subject lines, and real ROI framing. ADA compliance upsell angle is strong. This is the gold standard for outreach quality.

ecom_review.note: SYSTEMIC FAILURE. Ecom listing generator is shipping identical 'Brand new, ships fast. Message me for bulk pricing.' copy for EVERY product. This has been happening since at least Mar 5 (checked older listings). The generator needs a complete rewrite to produce product-specific descriptions. BLOCKED until fixed.

freelance_review.note: CRITICAL FAILURE. All freelance responses are copy-paste templates with '[Specific deliverable]' placeholders. The generator is not reading job post content at all. Contains chatbot artifacts ('Hi! I specialize in exactly this type of work.' / 'Happy to discuss scope and timeline.'). These are 100% AI-detectable and CANNOT be sent. Generator needs complete rebuild.

persistent_critical: 17 landing pages still have dead CTAs (href='#') - REVENUE BLOCKER (persistent since cycle 3)
BUFFER_UPLOAD_MAR7.csv pipeline bug (tweet_drafter.py) - persistent since cycle 4

trend.note: Cycle 9 shows a SPLIT: Social content and outreach are at their best ever (100% pass). But ecom and freelance pipelines are shipping empty templates that cannot be used. The 10 blocked items are ALL from these two broken generators. Fix the generators and pass rate jumps to 100%. This is not a content quality problem - it's a pipeline automation problem.
